## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod stand-up to discuss client updates, product improvements, and workflow strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/Dm4zSfk2sJMDSvb-VMYgb4w-c1Mrs8TJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New clients Airbyte and Sunbit added; Sunbit is a good fit with high volume (25 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/Dm4zSfk2sJMDSvb-VMYgb4w-c1Mrs8TJ?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Product team working on improving assignment direction and SEO integration in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Dm4zSfk2sJMDSvb-VMYgb4w-c1Mrs8TJ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Team members experimenting with Claude and Atlas for better content generation results](https://fathom.video/share/Dm4zSfk2sJMDSvb-VMYgb4w-c1Mrs8TJ?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Discussions on balancing SEO and readability in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Dm4zSfk2sJMDSvb-VMYgb4w-c1Mrs8TJ?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
